description: Demo user accounts for B2B guest access to Spaarke demo environment

users.notes: Primary demo account for sales presentations
Secondary demo account for parallel demonstrations

instructions.addingUsers: Add new entries to the 'users' array with email, displayName, role, and notes fields.
instructions.removingUsers: Remove entries from the 'users' array and re-run Invite-DemoUsers.ps1 with -RevokeRemoved to clean up.
instructions.customRoles: The 'role' field maps to Dataverse security roles. Default roles are listed in 'dataverseSecurityRoles'.
